Engineering and Natural Sciences Software Laboratory consists of 38+1 highly configured 28-inch computers with 3.2 GHz and 16 GB Ram support, smart board system and network devices, printers and scanners in an area of approximately 80 m² with special ventilation and cabling infrastructure.

Purpose of the Software Laboratory

This laboratory is mostly used by the students of the Department of Computer Engineering (English) in various project development courses such as Web Design, Application Design on Mobile Devices, Object Oriented Programming, Database Systems, Robotic Coding.

Our undergraduate students have the opportunity to use our modern laboratories, which have high-speed internet, outside of the classroom, as well as a laboratory where graduate students work with their instructors in their thesis studies, projects and research.
